/usr/bin/ar qc libArgusCommon.a CMakeFiles/ArgusCommon.dir/src/protocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ArgusCommon.dir/src/trie.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ArgusCommon.dir/src/hashtable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ArgusCommon.dir/src/priorityqueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ArgusCommon.dir/src/huffman.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ArgusCommon.dir/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ArgusCommon.dir/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ArgusCommon.dir/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ArgusCommon.dir/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ArgusCommon.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ArgusCommon.dir/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libArgusCommon.a
